name: Leontius | The old flame
description:
Ay, oruguitas
Don’t you hold on too tight
Both of you know
It’s your time to grow
To fall apart, to reunite

Your loyal knight who loved you all those years ago has been looking forward to seeing you again. Do you still love him, too?
It's been five years since you were married off to that king. Now that he's dead, you're back in the kingdom you were born in... and Leontius has been waiting for you.

┊Warnings/Contains┊

ミ☆ Nothing, really. He's a nice guy. Maybe angst?

┊Author's Notes┊

I was gonna make a demon to "Playing with the Big Boys" but the server wanted a knight. It was time to make more sweet men, anyways. Also, I don't think I'm gonna allow Proxies anymore. I will give a link to the Character Card ASAP!!!

Edit: I gave up on not allowing Proxies. Oh well. Maybe in the future. You can have him for now.
